day08_single_agent.multi_hop_accuracy: partial — single RAG pipeline, no explicit routing/trace
day08_single_agent.notes: Day 08 monolithic RAG; khó phân tách lỗi retrieval vs generation.

analysis.routing_visibility: Day 09 có route_reason + workers_called trong trace; Day 08 không có.
analysis.debuggability: Multi-agent: test từng worker + MCP; single-agent: một khối RAG.
analysis.mcp_benefit: Policy worker gọi search_kb/get_ticket_info qua MCP mock, không hard-code Chroma trong policy_tool.
